title: Dyetherite
body:
Dyetherite allows you to dye Netherite armor like you would leather armor, along with washing off dyed Netherite in a cauldron. Preserves names, enchantments, damage, and all other NBT. 

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/725837054092771368/783649533438722048/2020-12-02_02.52.17.png?width=2130&height=1331)
